zh.lifeSummary: 當Anna Maulick於1578年2月24日在德國爾特波格可萊斯 布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫受洗時，她的父親Remigius Maulick27歲，母親Anna Bentzen23歲。她於1597年與Baltas Beckers在德國爾特波格斯圖特加特豪森結婚。他們至少是2個兒子的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Anna Maulick于1578年2月24日在德国爾特波格可萊斯 布拉肯海姆迪倫其莫受洗时，她的父亲Remigius Maulick27岁，母亲Anna Bentzen23岁。她于1597年与Baltas Beckers在德国爾特波格斯圖特加特豪森结婚。他们至少是2个儿子的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Maulick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Rajiv, Ashish, Ashok, Babu, Bawa, Debashish, Deepa, Dhiraj, Dilip, Kalpana, Kaushik, Manish.  Arabic/Muslim Kamal, Mohammed, Abdur, Abid, Abida, Ali, Azhar, Farooq, Imtiaz, Irfan, Karem, Khalid.
Indian and Bangladeshi: variant of   Malik   1. Compare   Malick   4.
Variant of   Malick   1, a surname of Czech, Slovak, Ukrainian, Polish, and Slovenian origin (see   Malik   2 and 3).

variants.name: Malik
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Arabic/Muslim Abdul, Mohammad, Khalid, Tariq, Muhammad, Ahmed, Shahid, Javed, Ali, Ghulam, Mohammed, Zafar.  Indian Krishan, Ashok, Chander, Rajesh, Ashish, Asim, Rajiv, Rohit, Sanjay, Arun, Kiran, Madan.

Muslim (mainly Pakistan), Indian (mainly Punjab), and Assyrian/Chaldean: from a personal name based on Arabic malik ‘king’; or, especially in the Indian subcontinent, a status name for a headman of a village or a tribal leader derived from the same title. Al-Malik ‘the King’ is an attribute of Allah, ‘the king of mankind’ (Koran 114:2), giving rise to the compound name ʿAbd al-Malik, ʿAbdul-Malik (see Abdelmalek and Abdulmalik ). Compare Mallick .

Ukrainian and Rusyn (standard transliteration Malyk); Czech and Slovak (mainly Malík, also Málik); Polish, Sorbian, and Slovenian: nickname for a physically small man, derived from Ukrainian malyy, Czech and Slovak malý, Polish and Sorbian mały, Slovenian mal ‘small, little’. It is a cognate of Malec and Malek . Compare Malic and Malick .

variants.name: Mallik
meanings: Indian and Bangladeshi: variant of   Mallick  .

nameMeanings.name: Anna
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

variants.name: Anne
meanings: variant of Anne , in common use as a given name in most European languages. Among people with a classical education, it has from time to time been associated with Virgil's Aeneid, where it is borne by the sister of Dido , Queen of Carthage. This Phoenician name may ultimately be of Semitic origin, and thus related to the biblical Anne. However, the connection, if it exists, is indirect rather than direct.

en.lifeSummary: When Anna Maulick was christened on 24 February 1578, in Dürrenzimmern, Brackenheim, Württemberg, Germany, her father, Remigius Maulick, was 27 and her mother, Anna Bentzen, was 23. She married Baltas Beckers in 1597, in Hausen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Anna Maulick a été baptisée le 24 février 1578, à Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Remigius Maulick, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Anna Bentzen, avait 23 ans. Elle a épousé Baltas Beckers en 1597, à Hausen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils.

de.lifeSummary: Als Anna Maulick am 24. Februar 1578 in Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Deutschland getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Remigius Maulick 27 und ihre Mutter Anna Bentzen 23. Sie hat 1597 in Hausen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Deutschland Baltas Beckers geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Maulick è stato battezzato il 24 febbraio 1578 nel Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Germania, sua padre, Remigius Maulick, aveva 27 anni e sua madre, Anna Bentzen, aveva 23 anni. Lei sposato Baltas Beckers nel 1597, nel Hausen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli.

ja.Dürrenzimmern, Dürrenzimmern, Brackenhei: ドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブラクエンヘイムドuレンズインメルン

ja.Hausen /Zaber (OA. Brackenheim), Württem: ドイツウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートハウセン
ja.lifeSummary: Anna Maulickが1578年2月24日にドイツウuルッテンバーグクレイス ブラクエンヘイムドuレンズインメルンで洗礼を受けた時，父Remigius Maulickは27歳，母Anna Bentzenは23歳であった。1597年にドイツウuルッテンバーグストゥットガートハウセンでBaltas Beckersと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Anna Maulick(이)가 1578년 2월 24일 독일 wu르테버그 크레이스 브라c켄하임 드u렌지머에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Remigius Maulick(은)는 27세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna Bentzen(은)는 23세였다. 그녀는 1597년 독일 wu르테버그 스투트가트 하우센에서 Baltas Beckers(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Anna Maulick foi batizada em 24 de fevereiro de 1578, em Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Alemanha, seu pai, Remigius Maulick, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Anna Bentzen, tinha 23 anos. Ela casou-se com Baltas Beckers em 1597, em Hausen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Anna Maulick была крещена 24 февраля 1578 г. в местности дuррензиммирн, крис браккеним, вuрттембирг, Германия, её отцу по имени Remigius Maulick было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Anna Bentzen, 23. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Baltas Beckers в 1597 г. в местности хаусен, стуттгарт, вuрттембирг, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Anna Maulick se bautizó el 24 de febrero de 1578, en Dürrenzimmern, Kreis Brackenheim, Württemberg, Alemania, su papá, Remigius Maulick, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Anna Bentzen, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Baltas Beckers en 1597, en Hausen, Stuttgart, Württemberg, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos.
